meta_title: For Founders: API integration guide to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: API Integration Guide: Finish Your SaaS Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Use this API integration guide to ship faster, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code, and finally finish your SaaS project.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is integration friction. By decoupling API logic from your business core using Antigravity and automating implementation with Claude Code, you transform complex dependencies into modular, plug-and-play services. This approach reduces cognitive load, accelerates your speed-to-market, and ensures your SaaS MVP reaches customers rapidly.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You have the vision, the database schema, and the UI mockups, but you’re paralyzed by the brittle, complex web of third-party API integrations that refuse to play nice with your architecture. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of a systematic integration strategy.

We are moving past the era of manual boilerplate. By treating API integrations as external, disposable services, you can reclaim your velocity. This tutorial provides the blueprint to bridge your business logic with external data, using modern AI-first tooling to turn that 'in progress' status into a live, revenue-generating product.

steps.title: Define API Contracts with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, formalize your data exchange. Use Antigravity to define the schema, ensuring your backend expects a predictable structure regardless of the third-party API quirks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust TypeScript interface and schema validator for a Stripe-like payment API response, focusing on error handling for 4xx and 5xx status codes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create api-contract.ts based on Antigravity schema definitions'

steps.title: Abstract External Logic into Services
steps.description: Never call an API directly from your UI or controllers. Create an abstraction layer so you can swap providers without refactoring your entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API service wrapper pattern that implements an interface for external data fetching, including built-in exponential backoff retry logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/services/api-wrapper.ts --instruction 'implement the service wrapper pattern'

steps.title: Automate Mock Data for Rapid Prototyping
steps.description: Don't wait for production keys. Generate local mocks that reflect the real API behavior to keep your frontend development moving at full speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a mock data factory that simulates the API responses defined in step 1, including edge cases for empty states and rate limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate mock data factories for all service endpoints'

steps.title: Implement Production-Ready Authentication
steps.description: Securely handle API keys and OAuth tokens using environment variables and secret managers, ensuring your production credentials never touch your version control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a secure credential handler that uses environment variables for API keys and implements automatic token refreshing for OAuth2 workflows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/config/auth.ts --instruction 'implement secure env-based authentication flow'

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify your integrations automatically. Use Claude Code to write tests that run every time you push, preventing silent API failures from breaking your revenue stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests that validate the API service wrapper against the mock data factory, ensuring 100% contract coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate jest integration tests for all services'

pro_tips: Always wrap third-party API calls in a Circuit Breaker pattern to prevent cascading failures from taking down your entire app.
Log raw API requests and responses in development, but scrub all PII before logging in production to stay compliant.
Treat your API integration layer as a separate micro-module so it can be independently versioned or replaced.
Use 'Contract-First' development: write the test that fails when the API changes, then update your service to fix it.
Monitor your API usage costs daily via a dashboard; don't let a runaway loop in your code drain your credit card.
content.next_steps: Once your integrations are live, focus on building an automated monitoring dashboard to catch API errors before your users report them. Deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run user acceptance testing immediately.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop stalling and start shipping. Every day you spend 'polishing' is a day you aren't collecting feedback or revenue. Stop waiting for perfection and start building for impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
